name: webflow-data-handling
description: Implement Webflow data handling — CMS content delivery patterns, PII redaction in form submissions, GDPR/CCPA compliance for ecommerce data, and data retention policies. Trigger with phrases like "webflow data", "webflow PII", "webflow GDPR", "webflow data retention", "webflow privacy", "webflow CCPA", "webflow forms data".
